feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Feasibility of Assigning Different Smart Forms to the Same Billing Type for Different Sales Areas
entry.content: We are currently using SAP Public Cloud and have a requirement to assign different smart forms to the same billing type for different sales areas. I would like to know if this is feasible within the SAP Public Cloud environment.

entry.title: Mapas Fiscais Portugal - 33 - Reintegrações - Fiscal Maps
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are currently facing a problem on SAP S4Hana Public Cloud, where Fiscal Map 33 for Portugal isn't being generated, even though we have posted a revaluation and depreciation for that asset. 

Any idea what could be the issue?

Thanks in advance,
Best regards.

entry.title: How to change company code currency from KHR to USD in S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a business requirement of changing our Cambodia company code currency (10) from KHR currency to USD. I understand that the company code currency (10) by default cannot be changed in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.

I would like to know, is there any alternate solution or workaround for this?

entry.title: Issue while activating of Advanced Foreign Currency Valuation
entry.content:
Hi All,

We plan to activate the Advanced Foreign Currency Valuation in Quality and, after testing, move these changes to production as soon as possible. Before activation, we have a few issues that need addressing. Please review them and provide the best possible solutions:

Deprecation Timeline: Can you please provide a timeline for when the old Foreign Currency Valuation will be deprecated? We see it is going to be deprecated in 2508 according to SAP documentation.

Best Time for Activation: Can you clarify the best time to activate the Advanced Valuation? We noticed conflicting responses: the SAP help portal suggests the end of the fiscal year, while the FAQ recommends the start of the fiscal year. Additionally, the help portal mentions that activating in the middle of the year requires additional efforts. Can you clarify what these additional efforts entail?

Reversal in Quality: If we activate the Advanced Foreign Currency Valuation in Quality, is it possible to reverse it? If yes, how can we reverse it if there are already postings?

Restricting Changes to Production: If we activate Advanced Foreign Currency Valuation in Quality, is it possible to avoid or restrict moving these changes to production?

 

Thanks

Naveen Kumar

entry.title: Is the Best practice for Master Data in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition No Longer Being Updated?
entry.content:
Hello,
Is the BP (Best Practice) related to Master Data for S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition no longer being updated?

I found this site, but I couldn't find any versions beyond 2208.

I checked both SAP for Me and the SAP Signavio Process Navigator, but I couldn't find the BP documents for master data.

Is 2208 the latest version of the Master Data BP documents? If there is a more recent version, could you please provide guidance on where to find it?

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: How to add an item to the import function
entry.content:
How to add a cost center item to the import function for free shipments in the App Import Sales Orders Without Charge (App ID: F6382)


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Version of PO changes and sequential print in PO form
entry.content:
We have a requirement to print the PO form and if any changes happen it should be version 1 and if again some change happen and the form is printed again it should print as version 2.

As of now it just prints Purchase order and in case the PO is changed it prints Changed Purchase order as text in the Header of the form.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Asset acquisition posting in special period 13 Public Cloud leads to error F5567
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I would like to post an asset acquisition in period 13 in 2024.

I have created a new asset in the app “Manage Fixed Assets”, but I cannot post an acquisition to 31.12.2024.
I always get the following error message:

Unfortunately, I cannot select or enter a period in the asset posting.

The posting periods are open for the correction 2024 period 013 - 016 and from the normal periods of 2025 001 - 002.

Maybe you have an idea how to solve this. Or maybe it is not even possible to book asset accesses in the special periods in the public cloud?

Kind regards,

Vanessa

#F5567 #AssetAcquisition #period13

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud Intrastat Conversion of Regions
entry.content:
In SAP Public Cloud is there the option to define administrative regions specifically for Intrastat reporting? There is such an option for On-Premise, which allows to:

1. Define such regions, which are separate from the general regions in SAP.

2. Map these regions to the general regions. So that for example, if a product is sold to a destination in general region 22, in the Intrastat the region that is mapped to general region 22 is recorded.

I can't find the option for this within CBC for Public Cloud. Is the recommendation to set up entirely new general regions? What do we do with the existing ones, since those can't be deleted?

To give more context, we can't use the existing general regions, since they are defined with two-number codes, while the local legislation requires that the regions in the Intrastat report are only with three-letter codes.

Thanks,

Danail

entry.title: Email output completed in system but not sent from sap public cloud.
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have done the setup for customer to receive invoice in output parameter determination and maintained email ID in customer master. Output status is completed at billing document header but its not sent from SAP public cloud system. We have checked in message email transmission app but there is no entry for the email ID.

Please advise how to resolve this

entry.title: Fixed Asset : Ledger Settings
entry.content:
When setting up the Assets in Development we configured the 3 Ledgers 0L, 2L and 4G 

After all the Transports to Test System only 0L and 2L is available for Assets . How do we fix this please ?

entry.title: Can sap public cloud Warehouse management integrated with Sap warehouse robotics ? AMR / AGV int
entry.content: Sap public cloud warehouse mgt integrating with Sap warehouse robotics to connect or operate AMR/AGV (automated warehouse retrieval or automated guided vehicles ) has any one implemented this to understand the architecture?

entry.title: Create and default and layout on park incoming invoice app
entry.content:
Hi experts,

When doing Park Incoming Invoice app, we will enter GL accounts, and we noticed there are layouts available to change the order of the fields to be shown. We would like to create a layout for our own and set it as default. However, we seemed to be not able to find the app / place to do so.

Please suggest if creating / editing the layout is possible, and how if it is available. Any help will be appreciated. Thanks!

entry.title: Entering Trading Partner in Park supplier invoice App
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are performing park supplier invoice, and wanted to enter trading partner field. However, seems like it is not possible to enter this field like in GUI with Tcode FV60. Is there a way in public cloud to be able to enter trading partner while parking supplier invoice? Thanks!

entry.title: Free Form Payments Process in SAP
entry.content:
Hello Community,

We would like to understand about Free Form Payment Process in SAP. The Help.SAP portal offers product assistance in two aspects one is SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and other in Financial Operations.

Below are few questions regarding this topic
1. Free Form Payment are only used for Swiss QR-Bills and only CHF or EUR currencies are supported? ( Note - We are working in Public Cloud)
2. Is this model suitable only for one time customers/vendors?
3. How is it different to Automatic Payment Program?

We would really appreciate if the community can throw some light on this concept.

Regards,
Abha Hardikar

entry.title: how to trigger staple functionality in local printer with output from sap public cloud system
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have requirement to trigger the staple functionality from sap public cloud system. I have checked in sap note and print queue settings but there is no option related to staple.

Please advise if its possible

entry.title: 在管理付款申请APP页面，执行付款策略时，选择了银行之后，无法选择金融交易类型，导致付款申请无法下推，不能生成付款凭证
entry.content: #SAP S4HANA #SAP S4HANA Cloud #SAP S4HANA Cloud Public E #SAP S4HANA Cloud Public Edition #SAP S4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance#;1.在管理付款申请APP页面，执行付款策略时，选择了银行之后，无法选择金融交易类型，导致付款申请无法下推，不能生成付款凭证;2.如果取消了生成现金流量表的金融交易类型必输，导致无法生成正确现金流量表;如何处理

entry.title: Change credit limit currency.
entry.content:
Credit limit currency is not as per the customer currency and not editable.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Restricted Access to Pricing Configuration Elements in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
I am a Junior Consultant for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, specializing in the Sales and Distribution module. I am still becoming familiar with the system, and I am currently reviewing the topic of sales pricing configuration. When I try to access the app Implementation Activities -> General Business Data -> Price Management -> Sales Pricing -> Setting for Pricing in Sales, I only see a few configuration options available, and they do not include the basic settings needed for condition configuration, such as condition tables, pricing procedures, or access sequences.

When I try to check these configurations through CBC, I am redirected to an error page.
I have confirmed with my facilitator that I have the necessary access rights.
Do you know what might be causing this issue?

entry.title: Global Currency amount is 0, how to correct it?
entry.content:
The global currency amount in JE should be the same as company code currency amount. How can I correct it?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
